hero.badge: Precision prep planning, powered by AI
hero.titleLine2: Know exactly what — and how much — to cook.
hero.subtitle: Every morning, PrepIQ gives your team a precise prep plan — built from your sales history, demand signals, and real kitchen patterns. No guesswork. No waste.

footer.description: Daily prep intelligence for kitchens that take food operations seriously. Predict demand, reduce waste, protect margins.

howItWorks.title: How PrepIQ Works <gold>Every Day</gold>
howItWorks.subtitle: Three phases. One learning loop. Every day your kitchen gets smarter, wastes less, and earns more.

plan.label: Plan
plan.title: AI-Powered Prep Forecast
plan.body: Before your kitchen opens, PrepIQ analyses data from your POS system to predict exactly how much of each item to prepare. No more gut feelings — just data-driven quantities with confidence scores.

live.label: Monitor
live.title: Real-Time Monitoring
live.body: Once service begins, PrepIQ tracks sales via your POS integration. See what's selling fast, what's lagging, and where risk is building — all in real time.

review.label: Learn
review.title: Learn & Improve
review.body: After service, PrepIQ generates a full performance review: what was wasted, what stocked out, how accurate the forecast was, and what the chef overrides actually cost. Every data point sharpens tomorrow's predictions.

chefOverride.title: Chef Override
chefOverride.body: Your team can always adjust quantities. When they do, PrepIQ instantly shows the risk: potential waste cost, stockout probability, and profit upside. The AI learns from every override to improve tomorrow's forecast.

previews.stockoutRiskBody: At current pace, you'll run out in ~{{minutes}} minutes. Consider notifying front-of-house or adjusting menu availability.
previews.modelUpdatedBody: Today's data has been absorbed. Tomorrow's forecast will factor in today's patterns and override outcomes.

impact.note: {{day}} demand typically drops {{pct}}% vs {{prevDay}}. Historical chef overrides for this item are accurate {{acc}}% of the time. <primary> AI will learn from this decision.</primary>

stats.savingsSummary: You saved $42 in waste and prevented 0 stockouts.
stats.soupRisk: Tomato Soup trending to stockout by 7:30 PM — consider +3 L batch

kitchenNetwork.subtitle: When one branch makes a mistake, every other branch is protected. PrepIQ's AI learns from each location and automatically prevents the same issue across your entire network.

one.title: Step 1 · Problem Detected
one.body: Waste, stockout, or demand shift detected at any location

two.title: Step 2 · Auto-Protected

three.body: The fix is automatically applied everywhere — before the problem repeats

kitchenNetwork.flywheelTitle: How it gets smarter over time
kitchenNetwork.flywheelFooter: The more branches you add, the faster every kitchen learns. A true network-effect intelligence system.

waste.problem: Over-prepped avocados on Mondays — 8kg wasted weekly
